title: Question regarding the manga release date
display_title: Question regarding the manga release date
wikitext:
[]: Question regarding the manga release date             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Sun Dec 17, 2006 7:03 pm Why is it that I keep hearing of the manga being first released in February 1995 and the Anime being first aired in October 1995 despite the fact the Anime is supposed to have come first? What kind of time magic is this? Someone please explain this wizardry to me.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Dec 17, 2006 7:27 pm Evangelion was planned as an anime series. The decision to make a manga incarnation came later. Due to the manner in which anime and manga are produced, not to mention the fact that Eva missed its originally intended premiere date, the manga hit the stands ahead of the anime series. So, in some respects, the manga predates the anime. But in other respects, the anime predates the manga. Does that make sense?

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Sun Dec 17, 2006 7:43 pm So, basically the Manga adaptation came out first despite the fact the series was originally planned to do so? LOL GAINAX, releasing adaptations of their works before said works are even properly published.

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Sun Dec 17, 2006 8:11 pm Just like Star Wars! [URL=http://imageshack.us] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Sun Dec 17, 2006 11:51 pm Quantum Magic. End of story.
